action: Add a monotonic client state store contract and recovery packet so accepted witness-policy sequence and digest survive restart and stale mirrors cannot replay older valid policy.

progress.verification: 5 deterministic dependency-free Node tests passed locally against the committed source content.

handoff: R-014 should define an atomic persistence adapter and crash-recovery test that proves the retained state anchor cannot be partially written or silently reset.
limits: No durable storage backend or atomic write primitive is included.
External anchor deletion or corruption remains a rollback boundary.
Continuity and digest validity do not prove witness honesty or policy truth.
